modal.title: Logout
modal.question: Are you sure you want to logout?
modal.warning: You will need to login again to access the admin panel

titleEditor.triggerAriaLabel: Edit homepage headline and typing subtitles
titleEditor.placeholder: For example: Welcome to my cozy corner

trash.title: Move to Trash
trash.question: Are you sure you want to move "{title}" to Trash?
trash.warning: You can find and restore it from the Trash section at any time.

delete.title: Delete Permanently
delete.question: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{title}"?
delete.warning: This action cannot be undone. The post will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

settings.languageHint: As the preview operates in an isolated environment, a quick reload is required for language changes. Theme and Hue settings sync in real-time.

siteInfo.title: Site Information
siteInfo.description: Set your site name and icon, which will appear in the browser tab.

hero.description: Set the main title and subtitles displayed on the homepage, with support for automatic cycling.

footer.title: Footer Settings
footer.description: Configure the content displayed in the site footer.

account.title: Account Security
account.description: Manage your login credentials, including username, email, and password.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Set your personal bio and manage social platform links displayed on your homepage.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Introduce yourself in a few sentences...

social.title: Social Links
social.description: Configure social platform links displayed in your sidebar.

links.title: Social Platforms
links.nameRequired: Please enter platform name before uploading icon

section.title: SMTP Service
section.description: Configure SMTP server to enable email notification functions.

preview.testMessage: This is an automatically generated test email to verify your SMTP configuration. If you receive this message, it means your email service is successfully connected and ready to go.
preview.footerNote: This email was automatically generated to test connection stability. You do not need to reply.

send.title: Send Email
send.description: Enter recipient addresses, preview the parsed list, and send a notification email.

recipient.label: Recipients
recipient.hint: Enter multiple addresses separated by commas (,), semicolons (;), or spaces. The list will sync automatically.

send.noRecipient: Please add at least one recipient

brand.line3: Let's pick up where you left off

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to manage your blog

step1.title: Forgot Password
step1.description: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a verification code

email.label: Email
email.placeholder: Enter the email you registered with

step2.title: Reset Password
step2.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your email and set a new password

code.label: Verification Code
code.hint: The code is valid for 15 minutes

emails.title: Email Management

body_preview.reset_password: Password reset request from {location}, IP: {ip}, expires in {minutes} min

emails.empty_selection_desc: Select a message from the list to view its details and content.

step1.welcome: Welcome to your new blog journey.
step1.title: Appearance
step1.description: Customize how your blog looks and feels.

step2.title: Site Information
step2.description: This information will be displayed on the browser tab and at the bottom of the page.

siteTitle.label: Site Title
siteTitle.hint: Displayed in browser tabs and search results, this is your website's name

siteIcon.label: Site Icon
siteIcon.help1: Recommended to use 256x256 or larger PNG/ICO files

footer.label: Footer Copyright
footer.hint: Displayed at the bottom of every page, typically used for copyright notices

icp.label: ICP Filing Number
icp.hint: According to Chinese law, if your server is located in mainland China, you must display the ICP filing number

step3.title: Create Admin
step3.description: Create your administrator account to log in and manage your blog.

email.label: Email Address
email.hint: After configuring SMTP, the system may send notifications to this email

step4.title: Personalization
step4.description: Make your blog unique by uploading an avatar and home page banner for key locations.

personalization.title: Enable Personalization
personalization.description: Enabling this allows you to set an admin avatar and home page background.

avatar.label: Admin Avatar
avatar.description: Displayed in the homepage sidebar, recommended size 256x256 pixels.

hero.label: Home Page Banner
hero.description: This is your front door, displayed at the top of the home page.

step5.title: Email Notifications
step5.description: Configure SMTP service to enable your blog to send email notifications.

smtp.title: Enable SMTP
smtp.description: Enable this to configure email server for sending comment notifications, system messages, etc.

password.label: SMTP Password
password.placeholder: Enter SMTP password or app password
password.hint: Some email providers (e.g., Gmail, Outlook) require an app-specific password instead of your login password

senderEmail.label: Sender Email
senderEmail.hint: Defaults to SMTP username if not specified, useful for custom domain email services (e.g., Resend)

senderName.label: Sender Name
senderName.hint: If not specified, only email address is shown; when filled, displays as 'Name <email>' format

preview.title: Email Preview
preview.subject: This is a test email
preview.body: If you are reading this email, it means your SMTP service is configured correctly!
preview.footer: This is an automated system email sent by {name}. Please do not reply.

list.empty: No data yet, click the button above to add

auth.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address

appearance.hue_range: Hue must be a number between 0 and 360
appearance.language_invalid: Language must be zh-CN or en-US

site_info.title_range: Site title is required and must be under 100 characters
site_info.favicon_range: Favicon URL must be under 500 characters
site_info.footer_range: Footer text must be under 255 characters
site_info.icp_range: ICP number must be under 100 characters

personal_info.username_range: Display name must be under 100 characters
personal_info.avatar_range: Avatar URL must be under 500 characters
personal_info.social_name_range: Platform name must be under 50 characters
personal_info.social_url_range: Social link URL must be under 500 characters
personal_info.hero_range: Hero banner URL must be under 500 characters

smtp.host_range: SMTP host is required and must be under 255 characters
smtp.port_range: Port must be an integer between 1 and 65535
smtp.username_range: SMTP username is required and must be under 255 characters
smtp.password_range: SMTP password is required and must be under 255 characters
smtp.sender_email_invalid: Please enter a valid sender email
smtp.sender_name_range: Sender name must be under 100 characters

errors.Error: Unable to connect to the backend service
errors.用户名或邮箱已被注册: Username or email is already registered
errors.未登录或会话已过期: Not logged in or session expired
errors.请上传 1MB 以内的有效图片: Please upload a valid image under 1MB.
errors.请上传 5MB 以内的有效图片: Please upload a valid image under 5MB.
errors.请上传 2MB 以内的有效图片: Please upload a valid image under 2MB.
errors.SMTP 服务器连接失败: Invalid login: 535 Authent: SMTP connection failed: Authentication credentials (password or auth code) invalid
errors.SMTP 服务器连接失败: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND: SMTP connection failed: Hostname not found (DNS error)
errors.SMTP 服务器连接失败: Greeting never received: SMTP connection failed: Greeting never received (Check encryption settings or port)
errors.SMTP 配置不存在，请先完成邮件服务配置: SMTP is not configured. Please complete your email settings first.
errors.SMTP 服务未启用，请先在设置中开启邮件服务: SMTP is disabled. Please enable it in Settings first.
errors.验证码无效或已过期: Verification code is invalid or expired
errors.只能永久删除回收站中的文章，请先将文章移入回收站: Only posts in Trash can be permanently deleted
errors.该 slug 已被其他文章使用: This slug is already used by another post

success.若邮箱存在，验证码已发送，请注意查收: If the email exists, a verification code has been sent
success.密码重置成功，请使用新密码登录: Password reset successfully. Please sign in with your new password
